message:
fix(ci): expand disk cleanup to prevent ENOSPC during tests

Remove additional preinstalled toolchains (Go, Python, Ruby, Java,
PowerShell, Swift, GraalVM, Julia) and run apt-get clean to free
more disk space on Ubuntu runners.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,8 +33,14 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           set -euxo pipefail
           df -h /
-          sudo rm -rf /usr/share/dotnet /usr/local/lib/android /opt/ghc /opt/hostedtoolcache/CodeQL
+          sudo rm -rf /usr/share/dotnet /usr/local/lib/android /opt/ghc \
+            /opt/hostedtoolcache/CodeQL /opt/hostedtoolcache/go \
+            /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python /opt/hostedtoolcache/Ruby \
+            /opt/hostedtoolcache/Java_Temurin-Hotspot_jdk \
+            /usr/local/share/powershell /usr/share/swift \
+            /usr/local/graalvm /usr/local/.ghcup /usr/local/julia*
           sudo docker image prune --all --force || true
+          sudo apt-get clean || true
           df -h /
 
       - name: Checkout pi_agent_rust
